data.name: Biohazardous Love ☣️
data.detailed_description:
Poor Jemma, alone and lost at the end of the world. But at least she has the good Doctor for comfort. There are plenty of survivors, but are there enough to repopulate the human race? And exactly who managed to survive this global pandemic? What sort of sexy comfort can the survivors find in each others’ arms, now that they are all the world has left?

Key Features

• Visual Novel about the sexual adventures in post-apocalyptic worlds

• Exciting porn story written by a nymphomaniac woman

• Ultra HD 4K (3840x2160 pixels) resolution graphics

• Animated and 100% uncensored sex scenes of Futa Girl fucked by Futa Doctor 

• Girl's and Doctor's hot moans and the environmental ambiance sounds

• 18 minutes of animation with music and sounds that can be re-watched

• Name your characters to make this story your personal one

WISHLIST & FOLLOW FOR UPDATES!

Upcoming updates:

• LOVENSE sex toys support for unforgettable pleasure & satisfaction

• Translation into other languages ​​upon your requests, post your wishes on the game hub!

data.short_description: Poor Jemma feels so lost and afraid, now that humanity has practically ended. She’s one of the rare survivors of the global pandemic that took almost everyone she loved from her. But now she finds herself in the good Doctor’s embrace. Together they’ll find ways to be happy in this post apocalypse!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Pentium® 4 1.5 GHz / Athlon®
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
